title: SONGMICS Clothes Wardrobe, 1 Clothes Rail, 6 Tiers, Non-Woven Fabric, Metal Frame, 45 x 88 x 168 cm, for Bedroom, Hallway, Dressing Room, Grey with Chevron Pattern RYG084G22
features: Start Every Day off Right: Grab your shirt from the hanging rail, pants, socks, and hats from the shelves—getting ready becomes so easy when you have this fabric wardrobe keeping everything in one place

No Need to Sacrifice Style: A clothes storage organiser doesn't have to look dull and boring. The non-woven fabric with a herringbone pattern gives the closet a special look and brings character into your home
Got You Covered: Dust, accidents—don’t worry about these anymore. Just roll down the door, zip it, and the dustproof fabric cover will keep your new clothes new, and clean clothes clean
Use It Where? I say, anywhere you like! Whether in your living room, bedroom, or cloakroom, this fabric wardrobe will always work great to keep you organised

Stress-Free Assembly: With SONGMICS, no more “Oh dear, how am I going to assemble this large wardrobe?” Thanks to the detailed, easy-to-follow instructions and numbered parts, there's no reason to be afraid anymore!
description: Product Description No More Wrinkled Shirts and Dresses: This fully organised wardrobe will save you from the madness of finding the right outfit from piles of clothes in the morning rush. Use the 2 hanging rails to hang your clothes nicely and neatly for the next day’s work, so you’ll feel refreshed early in the morning. The non-woven fabric in an attractive linen look gives this fabric wardrobe a decorative touch. With hook-and-loop fasteners, you can easily roll up and secure the door. Thanks to the zipper, the wardrobe door can be opened and closed easily. Specifications: Colour: Black Material: Non-Woven Fabric, Metal Tube, Plastic Connector Product Size: 88 x 45 x 168 cm (L x W x H) Product Weight: 3.4 kg Max. Static Load Capacity of Each Hanging Rail: 15 kg Max. Static Load Capacity of Each Shelf: 5 kg Package Contents: 1 x Wardrobe 1 x Anti-Tip Kit 1 x Instructions (EN, DE, FR, ES, IT) SONGMICS Notes: Avoid using the product outdoors. For safety reasons, children are not allowed to climb or play on the product. Please attach the product to the wall with the included anti-tip kit for safety.
